extracted.title: Construction and Maintenance Schedule Posting
extracted.description:
As a courtesy, Columbia Gas Transmission, LLC (TCO) hereby notifies customers the Construction and Maintenance Schedule posted under "Construction and Maintenance" on the Informational Postings website has been updated. TCO reminds customers to please check the Maintenance Schedule on a regular basis.

The current schedule has been updated to reflect maintenance activity on the following:

* Revised dates – Summerfield Compressor Station Maintenance – April 9-22, 2026 (Previously scheduled for April 7-20, 2026)
* Line LEX Pigging from Majorsville to Lone Oak Compressor Station – April 14, 2026
* Revised dates – Line BM39 Pipeline Maintenance – August 11-15, 2026 (Previously scheduled for July 13-18, 2026)
* Revised dates – Line BM19 Pipeline Maintenance – August 18-26, 2026 (Previously scheduled for August 11-19, 2026)

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Construction and Maintenance
TCO Construction and Maintenance Schedule 03-27-2026.pdf
affectedLocations: Line LEX (Majorsville to Lone Oak Compressor Station)
